recommendations.title: I Can Quit Whenever I Want 2: Masterclass
recommendations.overview: Pietro Zinni is asked by the police to revive the old gang to create a task force that will stop the spread of smart drugs.

recommendations.title: Mixed by Erry
recommendations.overview: The rise and fall of the pirate mixtape empire of three brothers from Naples, Italy, during the '80s.

recommendations.title: I Can Quit Whenever I Want
recommendations.overview: A university researcher is fired because of the cuts to university. To earn a living he decides to produce drugs recruiting his former colleagues, who despite their skills are living at the margins of society.

recommendations.title: Rose Island

recommendations.title: The Eight Mountains
recommendations.overview: An epic journey of friendship and self-discovery set in the breathtaking Italian Alps, The Eight Mountains follows over four decades the profound, complex relationship between Pietro and Bruno.

recommendations.title: Veinteañera, divorciada y fantástica
recommendations.overview: Regina, our young protagonist, always dreamed of getting married. And she did it - but the dream lasted much less than she thought and now she has to face life in a very funny way as a divorcee.

recommendations.title: Quiet Chaos
recommendations.overview: Pietro is a successful businessman with a wife and a daughter. One day he helps his brother save two women from drowning at the beach. When he returns home he finds that his wife has died. Now Pietro has to take care of his daughter, Claudia. When he

recommendations.title: The Witch: Part 2. The Other One
recommendations.overview: A girl wakes up in a huge secret laboratory, then accidentally meets another girl who is trying to protect her house from a gang. The mystery girl overthrows the gang with her unexpected powers, and laboratory staff set out to find her.

recommendations.title: Last Seen Alive
recommendations.overview: After Will Spann's wife suddenly vanishes at a gas station, his desperate search to find her leads him down a dark path that forces him to run from authorities and take the law into his own hands.

recommendations.title: Nuovo Olimpo
recommendations.overview: In 1970s Rome, a casual encounter between Enea and Pietro at a movie theater turns into an unforgettable romance — until destiny pulls them apart.
